scripts.build: python3 -c "import tomllib; f=open('cyrus2/pyproject.toml','rb'); tomllib.load(f); print('Build OK: cyrus2/pyproject.toml is valid TOML')"
scripts.check: python3 -c "import tomllib; f=open('cyrus2/pyproject.toml','rb'); tomllib.load(f); print('Check OK: cyrus2/pyproject.toml is valid TOML')"
